article.title: Noizekid: Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
article.subtitle: Collaborator with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer
article.author: D. Varela
article.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his collaborations with prominent names in the music industry. He has also released a sample pack in collaboration with Barnation.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer who has made a mark through his collaborations with well-known figures in the music industry.
His work has seen him partner with artists such as DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer, among others.

In addition to his production work, Noizekid has released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation. This pack includes a comprehensive collection of his samples, loops, and drums that have been utilized in various of his productions.
Artists similar to Noizekid include ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot.
